recalls.Description: iMirror Inc. is recalling its Electric Bug Zapper Racket, Fly Swatter, and Mosquito Swatter designed for both indoor and outdoor use. These products feature a rectangular silver sticker on the back of the handle, displaying the model number BZ-001. The rechargeable battery in these devices poses a fire hazard when used for prolonged periods.
recalls.Title: iMirror Inc. Recalls Electric Bug Zapper Racket, Fly Swatter, and Mosquito Swatter Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach iMirror at their toll-free number 800-762-9066, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Alternatively, they can email ecommerce@imirror.com or visit www.imirror.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled iMirror Rechargeable Electric Fly Swatter
Model number labeled on the back of the recalled iMirror Rechargeable Electric Fly Swatter

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports of the swatter catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from May 2022 through June 2025, priced between $20 and $40.

Importers.Name: iMirror Inc., of Rancho Cucamonga, California

Hazards.Name: Fire risk from rechargeable battery during extended use

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product immediately and contact iMirror for a full refund. iMirror will provide pre-paid shipping labels for returns, and refunds will be processed promptly upon receipt of the returned product. Customers will receive notifications through Amazon or via email regarding the refund process.

recalls.metaDescription: iMirror recalls Electric Bug Zapper Racket, Fly Swatter, and Mosquito Swatter due to fire hazards. Contact for refunds and safety information.
